title: U.S. Forces Attack Iranian Mine-Laying Ships Near the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: A video posted by the U.S. Central Command showed munitions striking nine vessels, most of which were moored at the time. Whether any mines have been laid in Gulf waters was unclear.
summary_public: A video posted by the U.S. Central Command showed munitions striking nine vessels, most of which were moored at the time. Whether any mines have been laid in Gulf waters was unclear.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. Forces Attack Iranian Mine-Laying Ships
